data.title: Walmart to build a $300 million North Carolina fulfillment center
data.description: Currently, Walmart operates more than 214 stores and Sam’s Clubs in North Carolina, along with seven supply chain facilities.

data.title: Procurement teams widely adopt AI, but few achieve maturity
data.description: Three-quarters (72%) described their AI maturity as “moderate,” with gains limited to certain functions.

data.title: Conga to acquire PROS B2B software business
data.description: For Conga, which already offers configure-price-quote (CPQ), contract lifecycle management (CLM) and document automation software, the deal would add PROS’s pricing science and analytics to its platform.

data.title: Salesforce's 2025 holiday sales predictions center around AI, pricing
data.description: Consumers will focus on resale and new product discovery methods to find the best prices this holiday shopping season, Salesforce data indicates.

data.title: Hertz launches online car-buying platform
data.description: The company said online expansion reflects its broader strategy to make retail its primary channel for selling vehicles.
